rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary:
This class is a practical class that focuses on speaking English. The aims are for students to acquire practical English skills centered on speaking and listening skills and to be able to use English for real communication purposes. This will be accomplished by using the basic language functions to frame English communication.
Students will do a variety of communicative tasks and activities based on various language functions. In the process of using English to practice real-life communication, students will learn to participate in conversations and respond appropriately. This will develop international understanding about how language is used differently across cultures. The goal is to improve skills by practicing conversation in English in a wide range of language use situations. Students will develop English vocabulary, pronunciation skills, cultural use of language, and conversational techniques through this course.
aims: The purpose is to acquire the basic abilities of daily English conversation by communicating and making the best use of the students' English proficiency. English Conversation is a practical course in which students practice skills to express themselves in a foreign language and negotiate meaning in communicative conversational settings.
goals: Students will learn what constitutes effective communication encounters and how to use conversation strategies.
Students will learn how to create, deliver, and respond to an informed opinion.
Students will gain experience cooperating with classmates in small group settings.
Students will increase their confidence and comfort level with using English.

textbooks: All material will be prepared by the teacher and distributed online via Teams.
prereq: Students must successfully complete Eikaiwa I.
prep: Students will be required to read texts, watch videos online, and prepare opinions and discussion questions outside of class time.
teachers: ◎ デイナ リングリー

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション
